title: IQVIA Digital Enablement Named PM360 Trailblazer 2023 Supplier/Vendor of the Year
text: INNOVATION PARK, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IQVIA™ (NYSE:IQV), a leading global provider of data, analytics, technology solutions and services to the life sciences industry, today announced that IQVIA Digital Enablement has been named a PM360 Trailblazer 2023 Company of the Year in the Supplier/Vendor category. Nominations for the PM360 Trailblazer Awards, which recognize outstanding achievement and innovation in healthcare marketing, are judged by their Editorial Advisory Board of industry experts.

title: IQVIA CFO Ron Bruehlman to Speak at Evercore HealthCONx Conference on November 29, 2023
text: INNOVATION PARK, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IQVIA Holdings Inc. (“IQVIA”) (NYSE:IQV), announced today that Ron Bruehlman, executive vice president and chief financial officer, will speak at the Evercore Annual HealthCONx Conference in Miami on Wednesday, November 29, 2023 at 10:50 a.m. ET. A live audio webcast of the presentation will be available on the IQVIA Investor Relations website at http://ir.iqvia.com. A replay of the webcast will be available later that day. title: IQVIA Announces Upsizing of its Allocation of New Term B Loans
text: INNOVATION PARK, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE:IQV) (the “Company”) today announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, IQVIA Inc. (the “Borrower”), allocated a new term B loan due 2031 of approximately $1,500 million (the “New Term Loan B”), which was upsized due to lender demand. The proceeds from the New Term Loan B, together with the proceeds from the Borrower's offering of $1,250 million in aggregate principal amount of senior secured notes due 2029 (the “Notes”), are expe.

title: IQVIA Announces Pricing of Upsized Offering of Senior Secured Notes
text: INNOVATION PARK, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE:IQV) (the “Company”) today announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, IQVIA Inc. (the “Issuer” or “Borrower”), priced an offering of $1,250 million in aggregate principal amount of senior secured notes due 2029 (the “Notes”), which was upsized due to strong demand. Substantially concurrently with the closing of this offering, the Borrower intends to amend its senior secured credit facilities (the “Credit Agreement Amendment”) to.

title: IQVIA Announces Offering of Senior Secured Notes
text: INNOVATION PARK, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE:IQV) (the “Company”) today announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, IQVIA Inc. (the “Issuer” or “Borrower”), intends to raise $500,000,000 through an offering of senior secured notes due 2029 (the “Notes”). Substantially concurrently with the closing of this offering, the Borrower intends to amend its senior secured credit facilities (the “Credit Agreement Amendment”) to provide for a new term B loan of approximately $1,250 mi.

title: IQVIA: I Would Stay Away Until Debt Issues Are Resolved
text: IQVIA is a global provider of contract research services and data analytics for the healthcare industry. The company helps clients drive healthcare forward by providing insights and solutions to improve. The Net Debt/EBITDA ratio is 4.6x, moreover, 55% of its debt is at a floating rate, which is very worrying in an environment with high rates. Although the company doesn't seem particularly expensive at its current valuation, I would demand a greater margin of safety until debt concerns are resolved.

title: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Miss
text: IQVIA Holdings' (IQV) revenues increase year over year in third-quarter 2023.

title: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.49 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.46 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.48 per share a year ago.
